name: ChecklistTasksDone
description: Describes a service message about checklist tasks marked as done or not done.

fields.name: checklist_message
fields.description: Message containing the checklist whose tasks were marked as done or not done. Note that the Message object in this field will not contain the reply_to_message field even if it itself is a reply.

fields.name: marked_as_done_task_ids
fields.description: Identifiers of the tasks that were marked as done

fields.name: marked_as_not_done_task_ids
fields.description: Identifiers of the tasks that were marked as not done
